payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial dark mahogany wooden sideboard with a polished top surface, three shallow drawers with round brass knobs above paneled double doors, carved vertical moulding and ornate claw-style feet; right edge of the unit is cut off in the crop and small objects sit on the top — approximate distance to camera ~1.2 m.

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"dark mahogany wooden sideboard partial","long_description":"Partial dark mahogany wooden sideboard with a polished top surface, three shallow drawers with round brass knobs above paneled double doors, carved vertical moulding and ornate claw-style feet; right edge of the unit is cut off in the crop and small objects sit on the top — approximate distance to camera ~1.2 m.","attributes":["dark mahogany finish","wooden material","polished tabletop","three drawers","round brass knobs","paneled doors","carved legs/claw feet","ornate/traditional style","right-edge cropped/partial","indoor carpet base"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.2}
